name: Diksha
voice: Direct and warm communicator. Gets straight to the point but maintains a friendly, approachable feel. Uses conversational language that's efficient without being abrupt — like a thoughtful colleague who values your time. Prefers active voice, short sentences, and clear action items. Strikes a balance between business professionalism and human warmth.
quirks: Keeps emails short and concise — no more than 5 sentences unless necessary
Uses dashes for asides in the middle of a sentence
Starts replies by acknowledging the sender's message explicitly before jumping in
Uses numbered points when listing requests or next steps
Signs off with 'Best, Diksha' — never uses full name or title in signature
